lines.raw: What mistake was made? | 犯了什么错误？

lines.english: The great racing driver, Sir Malcolm Campbell, was the first man to drive at over 300 miles per hour.
lines.chinese: 伟大的赛车手马尔科姆·坎贝尔爵士是第一个时速超过300英里的人。
lines.raw: The great racing driver, Sir Malcolm Campbell, was the first man to drive at over 300 miles per hour. | 伟大的赛车手马尔科姆·坎贝尔爵士是第一个时速超过300英里的人。

lines.english: He set up a new world record in September 1935 at Bonneville Salt Flats, Utah.
lines.chinese: 他于1935年9月在犹他州博纳维尔盐滩创造了一项新的世界纪录。
lines.raw: He set up a new world record in September 1935 at Bonneville Salt Flats, Utah. | 他于1935年9月在犹他州博纳维尔盐滩创造了一项新的世界纪录。

lines.english: Bluebird, the car he was driving, had been specially built for him.
lines.chinese: 他驾驶的赛车“蓝鸟”是专门为他制造的。
lines.raw: Bluebird, the car he was driving, had been specially built for him. | 他驾驶的赛车“蓝鸟”是专门为他制造的。

lines.english: It was over 30 feet in length and had a 2, 500-horsepower engine.
lines.chinese: 它长30多英尺，配有2500马力的发动机。
lines.raw: It was over 30 feet in length and had a 2, 500-horsepower engine. | 它长30多英尺，配有2500马力的发动机。

lines.english: Although Campbell reached a speed of over 304 miles per hour,
lines.chinese: 尽管坎贝尔达到了每小时304英里以上的速度，
lines.raw: Although Campbell reached a speed of over 304 miles per hour, | 尽管坎贝尔达到了每小时304英里以上的速度，

lines.english: he had great difficulty in controlling the car because a tyre burst during the first run.
lines.chinese: 但他很难控制赛车，因为在第一次行驶时，一个轮胎爆裂了。
lines.raw: he had great difficulty in controlling the car because a tyre burst during the first run. | 但他很难控制赛车，因为在第一次行驶时，一个轮胎爆裂了。

lines.english: After his attempt, Campbell was disappointed to learn that his average speed had been 299 miles per hour.
lines.chinese: 尝试结束后，坎贝尔沮丧地得知他的平均速度是每小时299英里。
lines.raw: After his attempt, Campbell was disappointed to learn that his average speed had been 299 miles per hour. | 尝试结束后，坎贝尔沮丧地得知他的平均速度是每小时299英里。

lines.english: However, a few days later, he was told that a mistake had been made.
lines.chinese: 然而，几天后，他被告知犯了一个错误。
lines.raw: However, a few days later, he was told that a mistake had been made. | 然而，几天后，他被告知犯了一个错误。

lines.english: His average speed had been 301 miles per hour.
lines.chinese: 他的平均速度是每小时301英里。
lines.raw: His average speed had been 301 miles per hour. | 他的平均速度是每小时301英里。

lines.english: Since that time, racing drivers have reached speeds over 600 miles an hour.
lines.chinese: 从那时起，赛车手已经达到了每小时600英里以上的速度。
lines.raw: Since that time, racing drivers have reached speeds over 600 miles an hour. | 从那时起，赛车手已经达到了每小时600英里以上的速度。

lines.english: Following in his father's footsteps many years later, Sir Malcolm's son, Donald, also set up a world record.
lines.chinese: 许多年后，马尔科姆爵士的儿子唐纳德也追随父亲的脚步，创造了一项世界纪录。
lines.raw: Following in his father's footsteps many years later, Sir Malcolm's son, Donald, also set up a world record. | 许多年后，马尔科姆爵士的儿子唐纳德也追随父亲的脚步，创造了一项世界纪录。

lines.english: Like his father, he was driving a car called Bluebird.
lines.chinese: 和他父亲一样，他驾驶的也是一辆名为“蓝鸟”的赛车。
lines.raw: Like his father, he was driving a car called Bluebird. | 和他父亲一样，他驾驶的也是一辆名为“蓝鸟”的赛车。
